pymoo.reason: load-bearing isolated capability probe for NSGA-II Pareto search and hypervolume evaluation

capability_summary.can: Run NSGA-II on ZDT1 (30 vars, 2 objectives) producing a Pareto front with >= 3 solutions and positive hypervolume relative to [1.1, 1.1]; handles pop_size=4 boundary without crashing.
capability_summary.cannot: Does not guarantee convergence to the true Pareto front in few generations; very small pop_size degrades diversity; no GPU acceleration for fitness evaluation by default.
